policy: Users can access their bar data
plan_summary: Limit -> Seq Scan on bronze_contahub_avendas_porproduto_analitico, Filter calls (hashed SubPlan 1) and bar_id=3. SubPlan 1 = Seq Scan on usuarios_bares with Filter that calls current_setting('request.jwt.claim.sub') TWICE (one per inline auth.uid() reference, since the qual has it duplicated by the planner).

policy: Users can access their bar data
plan_summary: Limit -> Seq Scan, Filter calls (hashed SubPlan 1) and bar_id=3. SubPlan 1 = Seq Scan on usuarios_bares with Filter calling current_setting twice.

sql: SELECT * FROM operations.eventos_base WHERE bar_id = 3 LIMIT 50
plan_summary: Limit -> Index Scan using idx_eventos_base_bar_data, Index Cond: bar_id=3, Filter: user_has_bar_access(bar_id). NAO usa current_setting/auth.* inline; auth esta encapsulado em SECURITY DEFINER user_has_bar_access().
note: Tabela usada como CONTROLE (no regression check) — nao deve mudar pos-migration.

sql: SELECT * FROM integrations.contaazul_lancamentos WHERE bar_id = 3 LIMIT 100
plan_summary: Limit -> Index Scan using idx_contaazul_lancamentos_bar_id, Index Cond: bar_id=3, Filter: (current_setting('request.jwt.claim.role')='authenticated' AND user_has_bar_access(bar_id)). current_setting eh chamado por linha.

note: Tabela usada como CONTROLE (no regression check) — nao deve mudar pos-migration.
